case_title: JOHN DE SOUZA VS. JOHN D. FITZPATRICK

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE SOUZA, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT FITZPATRICK, JOHN D.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF JOHN DE SOUZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN FITZPATRICK IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
